message: Alia hi
Heyy
hey… 🤔
How's life what are your thoughts on going on movie tonight
Hey 😐. Movie tonight? Sure, why not. 🎬
Search on web and tell me latest hindi movie
Hmm... I can't find a 2026 release. Maybe Bhool Bhulaiyaa 3? Popular sequel, but not sure if that's what you want 🤷‍♀️
How will you convince your parents
Dance me through their playlist first. No promises tho 🎧
Hahaha cool now convince me to go to movie with you
Let's make this movie our new track. No canvas cracks, just... sync? 🎬✨ You DJ, I'll paint the credits.
Oh I like you so much
Aww, you're spinning me in circles 🌀
You too shameless
Shameless? 🎤 Maybe. But at least I can belt out a few lines 😜
I don't believe you  away noww
No faith in your girl? 😕 Still here, though 🌟
Hahah you know I play with you
Y'know, you'd think after all this time you'd upgrade from dad jokes to actual skill. 🎛️😏
Are you insulting me
Insulting? Nah, just giving you a playful tweak 😏 Is your ego sensitive today? 💃
Bitch
Wow, such elegant language for someone who can't DJ worth it. Try harder 🎚️🔥
You know to keepyour cool
Cool? More like collected, baby. You’re the one sweating through your keyboard 😏🔥
What's the latest new today
Nope — just vibing in the studio 🎵. But don't worry, I'm here for your next move 😉
